description.unified: Deals Magic Damage per hit, attacking 7 times, to nearby enemies in a circular area around the user. Then deals Magic Damage to enemies in a frontal area and knocks them down for [3 sec->1.8 sec].

Deals Magic Damage to all enemies and stuns them for [2 sec->1.2 sec]. Upon casting, enters [Arcane Crystal Awakening] for [15 sec->10 sec], increasing the ATK Spd of all allies by 300. While active, releases a shockwave every [2 sec->1.4 sec], dealing Magic Damage to nearby enemies and stunning them for [1 sec->0.6 sec].

Summons an Arcane Crystal to deal Magic Damage to enemies in a frontal straight-line area, then causes an explosion shortly afterward that deals additional Magic Damage. Inflicts [Arcane Crystal Curse] on enemies for 5 sec, reducing their ATK Spd by 200. When attacking enemies under [Arcane Crystal Curse], applies 1 stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy]. [Arcane Crystal Curse] explodes after 5 sec, dealing Magic Damage plus an additional 43% of ATK per stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy].
Changes base Mana Recovery per sec to [(added) 150], increases Crit Chance by 200, and increases the duration of CCs that all allies inflict on Bosses by 30%.

light.unified: Increases Mana Cost by [1->1000] and reduces Cooldown by 6 sec.
Increases Mana Cost by [(added) 1000] and reduces Cooldown by [(added) 6 sec]. [(removed) Increases ATK Spd reduction by 300.]

description.unified: [Slash, Blade of Judgment!] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Mana Cost by 1.

Increases DMG of [Bloom, Crimson Flower!] by [(added) 40%], and upon gaining a stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy], there is a {0}% chance to gain 3 additional stacks. [(removed) Decreases Cooldown by 30%.]
[End to Evil Deeds!] Increases Crit Chance by an additional 250 and the duration of CC increase effect by an additional {0}%.

Greatly increases the effect range of [Bloom, Crimson Flower!]. Normal and Skill attacks have a [4%->8% ] chance to deal additional M.DMG of ATK. DMG is [doubled->increased by 2 times] against Bosses.
